text: [NERVOUS] reactor's failing and i can't get the containment systems responsive
[GRIM] life support's cascade failing. everyone needs to evacuate non-essential sections
[PAINED] took a hit helping people to safety. everyone else is secure though
[GRIM] hull's breaching. sealing emergency bulkheads and calling everyone to stations
[PAINED] lost someone in that breach. the protocols we ran weren't enough
[LAUGHS] quiet shift today. she's purring and we're all in one piece. call that a win
trained half this team up from junior techs. watching them work makes me proud
[PAINED] lost a crew member today. blame the reactor failure, but the guilt's on me
[SUSPICIOUS] computer's been acting odd since it got damaged. keeping an eye on it
[NERVOUS] trying something that might not work. hopefully it does
hey, come on down to the engine room. great timing if you've got a minute
[WARM] morning shift crew. let's keep this running smooth, yeah?
[GRIM] reactor's misbehaving. i need everyone sharp and ready
[WARM] the way you handled that last crisis kept people alive. wanted you to know it
[FLIRTY] you know, watching someone work on the engine with real skill is attractive
[NERVOUS] could use your thoughts on something. i'm second-guessing my approach
[DRY] you're looking thoughtful today. problems with your section?
[GRIM] got something serious to tell you and i wish i didn't
[GRIM] hull's compromised. i need you ready for emergency protocols right now
[NERVOUS] disease outbreak affects air filtration. we need to isolate it fast
[WARM] you're solid. i mean that
[REASSURING] i've trained you well. you know what to do. trust that
[WARM] listen. look at me. we're going to fix this together. breathe
[LAUGHS] yeah, that one landed. mine was worse though
[WARM] forgotten already. we move forward. grab a drink if you need it
[EMPHASIS] copy. running the diagnostic now
[PAINED] we lost them. i take that responsibility seriously
[EMBARRASSED] oh — didn't expect that. that's really good to hear
[SUSPICIOUS] i want to trust it, but let's verify independently. can't be too careful
[PAINED] shoulder's giving me grief but i can still oversee. we keep going
[WARM] thanks for the support. having your back gives me confidence
[CURIOUS] what's your take? talk me through your approach
[GRIM] we've got the disease containment running. systems are holding
[WARM] everyone's secure. good thinking out there
[WARM] i actually trust the computer. it's never let the crew down
[WARM] door locked on crew. protocols worked, but it still went wrong somewhere
[CALM] everyone stay sharp. combat incoming and we need engineering ready
[WARM] see you next shift. keep her running smooth
[LAUGHS] alright, i need to check on the rest of the systems. you did solid today
[TIRED] gonna grab some rest. call if something critical happens
[EXHAUSTED] we made it through that. everyone goes to rest now
[WARM] glad to have you on the team. your work makes all the difference
[WARM] catch you next shift. keep being awesome
